symbols: pincers held against the saint's body — the instrument of her particular martyrdom
exposed torso — vulnerability and innocence subjected to cruelty
soldiers in helmets — Roman imperial power persecuting the faithful
green curtain — the veil between earthly suffering and heavenly glory
description: A half-length composition showing a young woman at center with exposed upper body, her expression calm and resolute despite the torment being inflicted. Several men surround her — one holds pincers against her chest, another grips tools. Soldiers wearing helmets stand at the left. A green drapery hangs behind the central figure. A distant landscape with hills is visible through a gap at upper left. The lighting focuses on the pale skin of the saint against the darker figures of her tormentors.
